creator: adrian@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

I'm running FreeBSD-HEAD i386 with the binary package repository.

I can't install linux-f10:

root@lucy-11i386:/home/adrian # pkg install linux-f10
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
FreeBSD repository is up-to-date.
All repositories are up-to-date.
pkg: linux-f10 has a missing dependency: linux-f10-flashplugin
pkg: No packages available to install matching 'linux-f10' have been found in the repositories

.. so what's the story?
